spec: Holo Control renders + functions in a real browser: boots, binds Holo UI tokens, loads the DSP core, populates real edges from the live catalog, ranks/switches/inspects, runs a conscience-gated control action that seals a receipt, and is honest where a feed is unwired

results.name: boots — the command center mounts
no uncaught page errors
Holo UI tokens bound (--holo-bg/-ink/-accent)
DSP core loaded and computes
real edges populate from the app catalog
real network ingress edges appear (Performance API)
SNR hero + stat tiles render
Apps & Agents lens renders ranked edge cards
inspector opens with throttle/restrict/pause/cut controls
a control action changes the edge state
the control action seals a verifiable receipt (κ)
a Holo Telemetry runtime is live (own or system)
real telemetry signals stream (spans/metrics/logs as κ-objects)
a streamed signal VERIFIES live — re-derives (Law L5)
W3C traceparent / runtime status shown in the header
inject⇄extract round-trips W3C Trace Context
seal trace → one PROV-O trace κ; verify re-derives the DAG
adopt context → correlated child span under the external trace
toOtlp() emits OpenTelemetry OTLP + verifyAttestation() runs
unwired feed shows honest 'no signal' (no fabricated balance)
